c.d: The total number of active downloads or users indicating the platform's popularity and reach.

c.d: Availability of ads, sponsorships, virtual gifts, subscriptions, and other revenue mechanisms for streamers.
Types of live streaming supported including video, audio-only, multi-guest livestreaming, game live, and screen sharing.
Ability to stream simultaneously on multiple platforms or share streams across social media channels.
Whether the app is free, freemium, or subscription-based and availability of in-app purchases.
Maximum and typical resolution quality available during live streaming sessions.
Options for live interaction such as chat, polls, live games, and multi-guest streams.
